name: Chris Adams
bio: Chris is Chief Product and Technology Officer at Net Natives, a Brighton-based digital agency helping universities attract students globally.

name: Emmanuel Ide
bio: Emmanuel leads engineering at Glint, building tools that help organisations understand and improve employee engagement.

name: Martyn Fagg
bio: Martyn is CIO at Tillo, the global gift card network powering rewards, incentives and employee benefits for the world's leading brands.
